book: Decline of the West Volumes 1 and 2 - Oswald Spengler.kfx

issues.description: Cover image has slight pixelation and texture artifacts, possibly from compression
issues.suggestion: Re-render at higher DPI or use lossless compression to preserve texture clarity

issues.description: Minor OCR artifact: 'tedious)' appears as a standalone parenthetical without context
issues.suggestion: Review OCR output for punctuation and spacing consistency in footnotes and parentheticals

issues.description: German text block contains non-English characters that are correctly rendered but may be misread by some OCR systems
issues.suggestion: Ensure font support for non-English characters; no correction needed as rendering is accurate

issues.description: One paragraph ends with 'ab initio unnecessary' and continues on the next line, creating a mid-sentence break
issues.suggestion: Check line-breaking logic to prevent splitting of phrases across lines

issues.description: German phrase 'Alles Vergängliche ist nur ein Gleichnis' is present but not translated or marked, potentially confusing for readers
issues.suggestion: Consider adding a footnote or translation for non-English phrases in body text

issues.description: Footnote markers (15, 16, 17, 18) are present but not linked to footnotes on the same page
issues.suggestion: Ensure footnote references are properly linked or placed at the bottom of the page

issues.description: Heading 'CITIES AND PEOPLES: 3' is bold and centered, but '(C) PRIMITIVES, CULTURE PEOPLES, FELLAHEEN' is in parentheses and less prominent
issues.suggestion: Ensure subheadings maintain consistent visual hierarchy with main headings

issues.description: Paragraphs are long and lack clear breaks; some sentences run across multiple lines without visual separation
issues.suggestion: Consider adding paragraph breaks or indentation to improve readability

summary: Evaluated 8 pages across 1 batch(es). Average page score: 90/100.
